events.text: Sidny Cabral (Cabo Verde) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Rodrigo Bentancur (Uruguay) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! Uruguay 0, Cabo Verde 1. Kevin Pina (Cabo Verde) from a free kick with a right footed shot to the bottom right corner.
Goal! Uruguay 1, Cabo Verde 1. Maxi Araújo (Uruguay) header from very close range to the centre of the goal.
Substitution, Cabo Verde. Deroy Duarte replaces Telmo Arcanjo because of an injury.
Goal! Uruguay 2, Cabo Verde 1. Agustín Canobbio (Uruguay) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Maxi Araújo with a headed pass.
Mathías Olivera (Uruguay) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Cabo Verde. Nuno da Costa replaces Gilson Benchimol.
Substitution, Cabo Verde. Hélio Varela replaces Garry Rodrigues.
Goal! Uruguay 2, Cabo Verde 2. Hélio Varela (Cabo Verde) right footed shot from outside the box to the centre of the goal.
Substitution, Uruguay. Darwin Núñez replaces Federico Viñas.
Substitution, Uruguay. Nicolás de la Cruz replaces Manuel Ugarte.
Substitution, Cabo Verde. Laros Duarte replaces Kevin Pina because of an injury.
Substitution, Cabo Verde. Yannick Semedo replaces Jamiro Monteiro because of an injury.
Substitution, Uruguay. Brian Rodríguez replaces Maxi Araújo.
Diney Borges (Cabo Verde) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
